title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on books, reading and literacy.

questions.question: Do you think literacy rates around the world are improving or declining, and what factors are responsible?
How important do you think reading fiction is for developing empathy and understanding of the world?

script.text: Do you think literacy rates around the world are improving or declining, and what factors are responsible?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
